"'''Talnar's Rescue'''" is an adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. It was written by [[Sterling Hershey]] and illustrated by [[Matt Hatton|Matthew Hatton]]. It was later reworked for a [[Star Wars Miniatures]] scenario published on [[Wizards.com]].
